positive: Minimalist vector illustration, centered composition, depicting a constellation of whimsical forest elements: interconnected glowing mushroom caps, stylized autumn leaves, and meandering woodland vines forming abstract celestial patterns. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, rich gold, and soft sage green, set against a solid cream background. Style must be clean line art mixed with smooth, vibrant flat colors, suitable for high-quality screen printing on apparel. High contrast silhouette, symmetrical balance, detailed etching texture in the gold lines. Vector graphic, scientific illustration meets folklore.
negative: photorealistic, logo, watermark, text, blur, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, low detail, poor anatomy, grainy, messy, busy background
